title: 快速接入阿里云CDN-CDN(CDN)-阿里云帮助中心
heading_path: localhost name resolution is handled within DNS itself. # 127.0.0.1 localhost # ::1 localhost > # Host Database # # localhost is used to configure the loopback interface # when the system is booting. Do not change this entry. ## 127.0.0.1 localhost 255.255.255.255 broadcasthost ::1 localhost > 二、推荐配置
